[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111010110 6
1 000111001 4
2 110111111 8
3 111111000 6
4 101101100 5
5 110011100 5
6 000001101 3
7 100000000 1

01 10 111010110 6 match 0
12 21 111111111 a
23 32 110111111 8 match 2
34 43 111111111 a
45 54 111111100 7
56 65 111111100 7
67 76 110011101 6
70 07 110011101 6

02 20 110111001 6
13 31 111111111 a
24 42 111111001 7
35 53 111111111 a
46 64 111111100 7
57 75 101101101 6
60 06 110011100 5 match 5
71 17 111011111 8

14 41 111111110 8
25 52 101111101 7
36 63 110111111 8 match 2
47 74 111111101 8
50 05 111111100 7
61 16 111011110 7
72 27 000111101 5

26 62 110111101 7
37 73 110111111 8 match 2
